CHI.headline: NBA offseason 2026: Draft, free agency, trade targets for every team
CHI.description: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

CHI.headline: Mavericks take on the Bulls on 3-game skid
CHI.description: Chicago Bulls (31-50, 12th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Dallas Mavericks (25-56, 13th in the Western Conference)

CHI.headline: Orlando Magic vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
CHI.description: Orlando Magic vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

CHI.headline: Wagner scores 25 as Magic beat Bulls 127-103 and move into sixth-place tie in the East with Toronto
CHI.description: — Franz Wagner scored 25 points, Jamal Cain added 20 and the Orlando Magic remained in the running to avoid the play-in tournament by beating the Chicago Bulls 127-103 on Friday night.

CHI.headline: Orlando faces Chicago on 4-game win streak
CHI.description: Orlando Magic (44-36, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (31-49, 12th in the Eastern Conference)

DAL.headline: NBA offseason 2026: Draft, free agency, trade targets for every team
DAL.description: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

DAL.headline: Mavericks take on the Bulls on 3-game skid
DAL.description: Chicago Bulls (31-50, 12th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Dallas Mavericks (25-56, 13th in the Western Conference)

DAL.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
DAL.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

DAL.headline: Victor Wembanyama has 40 points, 13 rebounds in 65th game to lead Spurs past Mavericks 139-120
DAL.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 40 points and 13 rebounds in his 65th game to become eligible for NBA awards, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Dallas Mavericks 139-120 on Friday night.

DAL.headline: Dallas Mavericks vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights
DAL.description: Dallas Mavericks vs. San Antonio Spurs: Game Highlights
